summary: Iteration 156 — Credit Reminder Blast feature tested end-to-end. 29/32 backend tests passed (3 skipped — short template tests skipped because all test data customers are overdue, so no 'short' preview sample is generated). All UI features verified working. Found 1 medium-priority logic bug: total_customers count includes customers without phones, making the send button label misleading ('Send to 20 Customers (18 SMS)' when only 18 have phones).

minor.issue: short_count and detailed_count are incremented BEFORE the 'if not phones: continue' check (sms.py lines 648/662 vs 666). This causes total_customers = short_count + detailed_count to include customers without phones. Result: preview shows '20 Customers, 18 SMS' and send button says 'Send to 20 Customers (18 SMS)' — user thinks 20 customers are reached but only 18 will receive SMS. Fix: Move detailed_count/short_count increments to AFTER the phone check.

action_items: MEDIUM: Fix total_customers count to exclude no-phone customers. In sms.py credit_reminder_blast, move detailed_count += 1 and short_count += 1 to AFTER the 'if not phones: continue' check (currently lines 648/662 before phones check at line 666). This fixes the misleading 'Send to 20 Customers (18 SMS)' label.
critical_code_review_comments: BUG (MEDIUM): sms.py lines 648/662 — short_count/detailed_count incremented before 'if not phones: continue' at line 666. total_customers = short_count + detailed_count (line 712) wrongly includes customers with no phone. The send button shows 'Send to 20 Customers (18 SMS)' but only 18 will receive SMS. Moving the increment after phone check would fix this.
PASS: Smart template selection logic (overdue_amount > 0 OR days_until_due <= 15 → detailed) is correct.
PASS: All 6 required response fields (dry_run, total_customers, total_sms, short_count, detailed_count, preview, queued) are returned.
PASS: dry_run=True returns queued=0 correctly (no actual queue inserts).
PASS: branch_id filter works — non-existent branch returns 0 customers, valid branch returns subset.
PASS: min_balance filter works — high threshold returns 0 customers, 0 threshold includes all.
PASS: template_key = 'credit_reminder_blast' in queued sms_queue entries.
PASS: Detailed message includes customer name, balance, OVERDUE amount + days, est. interest, greeting.
PASS: Auth guard works — unauthenticated requests return 401/403.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all UI elements verified — tab, legend, preview stats, sample messages, send button)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Actual send tests used high min_balance (999999) to avoid flooding queue. One actual send (dry_run=false) was triggered for Branch 1 to verify template_key in queue.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Credit Blast feature works end-to-end. All 29 backend tests pass. UI fully functional. One minor bug: total_customers includes no-phone customers, but total_sms correctly excludes them. Short template tests were skipped because ALL test data customers are overdue (all get 'detailed' template). To test 'short' template path, a customer with balance > 0 but no overdue and due date > 15 days away would need to exist. Branch 1 ID: c435277f-9fc7-4d83-83e7-38be5b4423ac. 20 customers in system, 18 with phones, all overdue (detailed template). Physical SMS dispatch is MOCKED via Android gateway.

mocked_apis.note: Physical SMS dispatch is MOCKED — messages are queued but not actually sent via Android gateway.

rca_of_issue.bug: total_customers includes customers with no phones
rca_of_issue.root_cause: In sms.py credit_reminder_blast function (lines 636-667), the template counters (detailed_count += 1 at line 648, short_count += 1 at line 662) are incremented BEFORE the phone check block at lines 664-667. The 'continue' statement at line 667 skips adding to total_sms but does NOT undo the counter increment. Result: total_customers = short_count + detailed_count (line 712) is 20 (includes 2 no-phone customers) while total_sms = 18 (correctly excludes them).
rca_of_issue.reproduction: 1. Have 2 customers with balance>0 but no phone number. 2. POST /sms/credit-blast dry_run=true. 3. See total_customers > total_sms discrepancy. 4. Send button shows 'Send to X Customers (Y SMS)' where X > Y.
rca_of_issue.fix: Move 'detailed_count += 1' and 'short_count += 1' to after the phones check: phones = ...; if not phones: continue; total_sms += len(phones); detailed_count += 1 (or short_count += 1)
